name: Spirit Sense

heightened.text: The spell's duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

text: You open your mind to the metaphysical, enabling you to sense nearby spirits. Even if you aren't Searching, you get a check to find haunts and spirits in the area. You gain a +1 status bonus to the following checks regarding haunts or spirits: Perception checks to Seek, attempts to Recall Knowledge, skill checks to determine the reason for their existence, and skill checks to disable a haunt. You also gain a +1 status bonus to AC and saving throws against haunts and spirits.
